subject: Two large lizard-like creatures in mid-combat on a rocky cliffside — one prominent orange-red creature lunging with open jaws at a smaller green lizard that clings to the rock face
description: A dynamic wide scene of two reptilian creatures fighting on a rocky cliff face. The dominant creature in the upper left is large with orange-red and white banded coloring, a long serpentine body, and a wide-open maw showing teeth — it lunges downward. The smaller creature on the right is distinctly green-yellow with an insectoid or mantis-like body structure, clinging to the sheer rock wall, apparently caught mid-escape or counterattack. Rocky debris scatters from the impact point. The background is warm ochre rock with a small area of blue sky visible at upper right. The composition is diagonal and energetic.
foreground: Large orange-red serpentine lizard lunging with open jaws, green mantis-like lizard clinging to rock face
background: Warm ochre rock cliff, small patch of blue sky, scattered debris
